scenarios.name: lock_signature_byte_flip
scenarios.description: Flip a byte in the lock receipt Ed25519 signature. Must be caught by the lock signature verification step.

scenarios.name: exec_signature_byte_flip
scenarios.description: Flip a byte in the execution receipt Ed25519 signature. Must be caught by the exec signature verification step.

scenarios.name: entry_weight_tamper
scenarios.description: Change the weight of the first entry. The recomputed entry hash will not match what was committed in the lock receipt.

scenarios.name: entry_add_fake
scenarios.description: Add a fake entry to the bundle. The recomputed entry hash will differ from what the signed receipts committed to.

scenarios.name: drand_bls_signature_tamper
scenarios.description: Flip a byte in the bundle-level drand_signature field. This does not break any receipt signature (they sign the payload JCS, not the entropy). All upstream steps pass; only the BLS verification step catches the invalid drand signature.
